modules.name: journal
modules.description: Resizable notes canvas with smart text editing, markdown formatting, headings, lists, and exports.

modules.name: tidy
modules.description: Hide or fade individual modules and cables without changing global cable opacity.

modules.name: capture
modules.description: Export PNG snapshots and copy rack inventory (plugins, versions, module counts) for sharing.

modules.name: grab+
modules.description: Smart recorder. Auto-triggered one-shot (grab), retrospective rolling buffer (take), silence-gated ring (snip), plus a big rec button — short click to force-record, long click to save take.

modules.name: qmap
modules.description: Eight aux CV inputs that touch-map to any parameter in the rack. Per-slot unipolar/bipolar, and a master button that walks the arming cursor through all eight for one-shot full-rig assignment.

modules.name: qmod+
modules.description: 4 HP 14-slot modulation source with per-column mode cycle buttons. Five modes (random triggers, triggered S+H, smooth random, S+H, LFO) selectable per column; each slot can diverge. Joins a Q-array with neighbouring qmap / qmod modules.

modules.name: qmod
modules.description: 6 HP 14-slot modulation source. Per-column mode cycle buttons + a per-row log-scaled rate knob strip so every pair of slots can be hand-tuned relative to the base rate. Apply-stagger menu action writes a log-spread into the row knobs. Joins a Q-array with neighbouring qmap / qmod+ modules.
